steps.t: Use the summoning horn at the beginning of the tunnel to summon Radhril to your side.
You should talk to Radhril. <rgb=#FF0000>If Radhril is missing, and the Call Radhril skill is not available, try using the /pet release command.…
You should defend against the first assault. <rgb=#FF0000>If Radhril is missing, and the Call Radhril skill is not available, try using the /pet…
You should defend against the second assault. <rgb=#FF0000>If Radhril is missing, and the Call Radhril skill is not available, try using the /pe…
You should defend against the third assault. <rgb=#FF0000>If Radhril is missing, and the Call Radhril skill is not available, try using the /pet…
You should defend against the final assault. <rgb=#FF0000>If Radhril is missing, and the Call Radhril skill is not available, try using the /pet…
